content:
📌 Version 7.8 – Finalizing Absentee Consequences, Running from Skill Checks, Faction & Party Bonuses, and Betrayal Mechanics


🚀 This iteration locks in mechanics for absences affecting the class, running from skill checks, faction/party buffs, and the legendary betrayal system.

📜 1. Absentee Mechanic – How an Absence Affects the Entire Class

📜 Now, when an absent student is selected at random, the rest of the class suffers a consequence or shift.

✔ Absentee Effect Rolls (Triggered When an Absent Student Is Selected):
• 1-3 (Mild Effect): A small inconvenience—debuff to XP gain for that day.
• 4-6 (Moderate Effect): An environmental shift—a different setting is forced into play.
• 7-9 (Major Effect): A class-wide debuff, power-up disruption, or major rule shift.
• 10 (Severe Effect): A global game change—a curse is inflicted on the entire class.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 455 (chunk 455/555)
